findings.title: Policy grants full administrative access (Action:* Resource:*)
findings.description: Policy 'LegacyFullAdminPolicy' attached to ['deploy-bot'] allows every action on every resource.
findings.remediation: Scope the policy to specific actions and resource ARNs following least privilege.

findings.title: SSH (port 22) open to the entire internet
findings.remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific known IP ranges.

findings.title: S3 Block Public Access not fully enabled
findings.description: Bucket 'public-website-assets' has Block Public Access settings disabled.
findings.remediation: Enable all four Block Public Access settings.

findings.title: Weak HMAC secret guessed
findings.detail: Signature verified successfully using secret: 'secret'. Anyone with this secret can forge arbitrary valid tokens.

findings.title: Missing 'exp' (expiration) claim
findings.detail: Tokens without an expiration are valid forever once issued.

violations: financial report export restricted to 09:00-18:00 UTC
